Text.Page:
All right. You've got alkahest, an enchantable weapon, and some sacrifical weapons.

Let's get started.

Enchanting takes good equipment and makes it better, but it only works on items with the enchantable attribute.

You can enchant equipment to three tiers of power but, until you're more powerful, just focus on the first tier."Got it."

When you enchant an item, you also must consume an item of the same type and tier. I've given you a rare tier 5 weapon and two normal and two uncommon weapons.

First, open the enchant menu by pressing the "T" key. Right-click the item you want to enchant, your consumable item, and the alkahest, and then click the Enchant button.

Remember, though, that the more you enchant, the harder it gets. You might fail, but keep trying.

Got it? Good.

Enchanting becomes more difficult as you empower your equipment, but using better quality gear yields better results. Try enchanting your weapon again with the uncommon weapon.

You did it! Excellent work.

You don't need to go through the expense of enchanting your items to their maximum potential, but someday you'll find it useful.

You're a good student, . I hope this helped.
